title: Agent Management Scorecard
lede: Evaluate how effectively your engineers direct, manage, and optimise their AI reports.

sections.title: Engineer Performance
sections.description: Evaluate how well team members are managing their AI resources.

sections.title: Recent Upward Reviews
sections.description: Direct feedback from AI agents regarding the instructions they received.
items: Alice Chen: 'Excellent context provided via related files. I was able to infer the error handling behaviour easily.'
Bob Smith: 'Instructions lacked edge-case definitions for the API integration. Required 3 clarifying prompts.'
Charlie Davis: 'Good overarching goal, but the architectural constraints were slightly ambiguous. A more detailed lede would optimise my first pass.'

sections.title: Agent Autonomy Trend
sections.description: Percentage of AI tasks completed successfully without human correction.
sections.emptyMessage: Not enough historical data to display trends.

demoSteps: Review the top-level highlights to gauge overall team management of AI.
Check the 'Engineer Performance' table to identify who needs better prompting habits.
Read the 'Recent Upward Reviews' to see exact examples of where instructions fell short or excelled.
Analyze the autonomy trend to see if the team's management skills are improving over time.
notes: Use static mock data for the V1 to illustrate the concept of LLM 'upward reviews'.
Ensure UK spelling is used throughout the UI rendering.
The threshold in the series chart is set to 80% to show a goal-oriented view.
